title: Vacancy for Teacher at Arena Animation

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Arena Animation
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
